## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Run '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened (include error messages / stack traces).

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 / macOS / Windows]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.10]
- PyTorch version: [e.g. 2.1]
- GPU: [e.g. NVIDIA T4 / None]
- CUDA version: [e.g. 11.8]

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, paste relevant logs or screenshots here.
